texto: Change is possible if you allow it to happen. Nothing in life is constant
autor: it's always evolving and that's how life happens for me. Through my adversities I can reach new heights.

Through my adversities I can reach new heights. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Change is possible if you allow it to happen. Nothing in life is constant” articula reflexao, chimnese-davids, muses-of-wandering-passions em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e muses-of-wandering-passions.
